chat.placeholder: Tell me what you need — I’ll take care of it.

summary.label: Summary
summary.value: Can you give me a clear and concise summary of the following content? Feel free to highlight the key points and main idea.

learn.label: Learn
learn.value: Teach me this topic in a simple and understandable way. Break it down step-by-step and include any examples or analogies that will help me learn it better.

code.label: Code
code.value: I need help writing or understanding some code. Please provide a clean, efficient solution and explain how it works.

lifeStuff.label: Life stuff
lifeStuff.value: I need some advice or guidance about something personal or practical. Please give me a thoughtful and supportive response.

billixChoice.label: Billix choice
billixChoice.value: Pick something interesting or helpful for me—anything you think would be useful, insightful, or fun to explore.

hero.valueProposition: Billix is the only AI coworker that gets work done across 500+ apps. With <highlight>Chat</highlight>, <highlight>Image generation</highlight>, and <highlight>Seamless integrations</highlight>, you give the instructions — Billix reads, clicks, writes, navigates software, and completes tasks end-to-end

howItWorks.title: Say what you want Billix clicks, writes, and <serif>executes</serif>
howItWorks.description: Forget manual steps or workflow builders, just tell Billix what needs to be done. It reads, clicks, writes, navigates, and completes the task across your tools automatically

step1.title: Tell Billix what you want
step1.description: Type or speak your request. Billix understands and starts executing immediately—no setup, diagrams, or steps.
step1.typingInitial: How can I help you today?

step2.title: Billix executes across your tools
step2.description: Connects to 500+ apps — Gmail, Notion, Slack, HubSpot, and more. Billix completes multi-step tasks automatically.

step3.title: Tell Billix what you want
step3.description: See results as Billix completes each step Everything is saved, organized, and fully searchable inside your workspace

workspace.title: The Workspace
workspace.description1: Billix brings your tools, tasks, and AI capabilities into one unified workspace. Chat, delegate work, manage files, trigger automations, and connect with 500+ apps — with everything searchable, synced, and always up to date
workspace.description2: Billix replaces scattered tools and messy workflows with one unified AI platform. Chat, automate tasks, create content, manage files, and connect with 100+ apps — all in one organized, searchable workspace.

features.title: Everything you need — <serif> zero setup </serif>Billix does the work for you

directExecution.title: Direction Execution
directExecution.description: Billix understands your intent and executes tasks inside your tools — reading, clicking, writing, and navigating automatically. No triggers. No flow. No setup.

integrations.title: 500+ Instant Integrations
integrations.description: Billix connects to 500+ tools instantly — Slack, Notion, HubSpot, Gmail, ClickUp, Drive, and many more. No API keys. No setup. Billix works inside them like a real employee.

orchestration.title: Smart AI Orchestration
orchestration.description: Billix uses 60+ AI models to reason, plan, and execute tasks end-to-end. It chooses the right action and the right tool automatically.

security.title: Enterprise-Grade Security
security.description: Your data stays encrypted, your credentials safe, and every action logged–while Billix executes tasks inside your tools securely.

chat.title: Chat-Native Automation
chat.description: Type or speak your request. Billix understands your goal and starts executing immediately. No setup, no diagrams, no steps.
chat.userMessage: Create a task in Notion from this message and assign it to me for tomorrow

steps.assigning: Assigning it to your for tomorrow

result.line1: Task created in Notion and scheduled

actions.title: Real Actions, Not Just Responses
actions.description: Billix doesn't stop at generating text — it takes real actions across your stack. Send emails, post updates, create content, automate reports — all from chat.

items.docs: Billix created a Google Doc and shared it with your team
items.midjourney: Billix generated an image with Midjourney
items.linkedin: Billix posted your update to LinkedIn automatically
items.gmail: Billix drafted an email in Gmail and sent it to your client
items.x: Billix published a tweet to X on your behalf
items.dropbox: Billix summarized a PDF and stored it in Dropbox
items.github: Billix created a GitHub issue with your bug report
items.notion: Billix synced your meeting notes to Notion automatically
items.airtable: Billix synced your meeting notes to Notion automatically
items.drive: Billix synced your meeting notes to Notion automatically

whyUs.heading: Traditional automation tools require flows, logic, and triggers. Billix understands your goal and executes the task inside your apps — just like a real employee.

setupFree.label: Setup-Free Automation
setupFree.description: Others: Spend hours building zaps, triggers, and actions. Billix: Just describe the outcome you want — we handle the logic, connections, and execution automatically. 'Send today's sales report to the team.' → Billix figures out the right files, generates the report, and sends it — no setup.

naturalLanguage.label: Natural Language Control
naturalLanguage.description: You don't need to learn a tool — you just talk to it. Billix understands context, handles multi-step workflows, and updates you when it's done.

connected.label: Connected to Everything
connected.description: Over 500+ integrations out of the box — Gmail, Slack, Notion, HubSpot, Google Sheets, ClickUp, and more. If your app has an API, Billix can act on it.

realExecution.label: Real Execution, Not Suggestions
realExecution.description: While other AI tools write responses, Billix actually performs the work. Think of it as your digital employee that gets things done — not just one that talks.

compare.title: <serif>Traditional Automation</serif> vs Billix Automation
compare.description: With Billix, you speak naturally — and it executes tasks inside your apps automatically. No triggers, no flows, no manual steps — just real AI doing real work.

traditional.title: Traditional Automation
items: You must manually build flows step-by-step
Every app needs configuration and mapping
Break easily when something changes lorem ipsum
Slow setup before you can get anything done

billix.title: Billix Automation
items: No tech skills — speak naturally; Billix handles automation and integrations.
Direct Execution — chat with your apps; Billix acts instantly
Unified Workspace — chat, automate, create, and manage everything
Zero Setup — no triggers, flow builders, or complex config.
Understands Intent — plain-language directions become real tasks.

integrations.title: All your apps. One AI Brain.
integrations.paragraph1: Billix connects to 500+ apps and works inside them — sending emails, updating Notion, posting on social media, generating content, organizing files, and more. Connect once, and Billix handles the entire workflow automatically.
integrations.paragraph2: Connect once, and Billix handles everything in the background — from sending emails to updating Notion to posting on social. It’s the simplest way to bring your entire tech stack into one intelligent AI.
